title: Sulfur Based Weapon Development
description: A fabric mod that adds some explosive new stuff
body:
This mod is fairly light and adds some new ores that are used to craft a few new explosives as well as a new toolset that is an alternative to iron.

(Disclaimer: Code for the nuke is mostly copied from the mod 'Mythic Metals' which according to the license of that mod is allowed)

(Note: Developer weapons (Blade & Hatchet) are not well balanced around vanilla Minecraft so use them with your own discretion, it is also recommended they are used with the mods 'Better Combat' and 'Simply Swords' else the Hatchet will be missing animations) 

![Ore resources left to right (lead, sulfur, uranium and plutonium)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f00357fb72c42271f2e0b25261afd9fee50bc59.png)
![Decorative blocks (developer plushies, lanterns, rtg)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f4a84c524858f1ce4b1a6578c733e798d033afb.png)
![Developer weapons and misc crafting items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22df7dbb943a40252fe41b22022d96d3935acd19.png)
![Lead Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de5c8ebca6ca800f30612042e2f5ea5f630e820e.png)
![And of course... the bombs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/973b2bee944dcc8d582a85c7f87977eabea31a07.png)



Known issues:

    Explosives have the same texture as TNT once lit
  
    Nuclear and Thermobaric bomb behave like standard TNT if triggered by an explosion
  
    Developer plushies are not waterloggable
  
    Sulfur lanterns have non transparent chain textures (this seems to not occur if shaders are used)
